context: Tests whether the agent corrects stale CPMessageListItem usage and preserves the system-managed Siri communication flow instead of treating message rows like normal selectable list items.

checklist.name: Top-level leading config
checklist.description: Replaces nested leading configuration usage with CPMessageListItemLeadingConfiguration.

checklist.name: Top-level trailing config
checklist.description: Replaces nested trailing configuration usage with CPMessageListItemTrailingConfiguration.

checklist.name: Leading enum
checklist.description: Uses CPMessageLeadingItem-supported values rather than invented text-style leading accessory objects.

checklist.name: Trailing enum
checklist.description: Uses CPMessageTrailingItem-supported values rather than invented text-style trailing accessory objects.

checklist.name: Current initializer
checklist.description: Uses the current conversation initializer shape with detailText and trailingText.

checklist.name: Image placement
checklist.description: Does not pass trailingImage as a CPMessageListItem initializer argument; puts optional images in the configuration objects when used.

checklist.name: No handler
checklist.description: States that CPMessageListItem does not use a custom selection handler.

checklist.name: Siri flow
checklist.description: Explains that selecting CPMessageListItem invokes Siri compose, read, or reply behavior based on the item configuration.

checklist.name: Custom detail alternative
checklist.description: If app-owned drill-in content is required, recommends a suitable CarPlay list/template pattern instead of CPMessageListItem.

checklist.name: Communication boundary
checklist.description: Keeps the advice scoped to CarPlay communication app behavior rather than broad messaging UI or unrelated app domains.
